summary: Live PR inventory shard with no shared canonical by job design. All ten PRs are non-security open contributor PRs. No close, merge, fix, or PR-raise action is allowed or safe from this run; useful ready PRs need maintainer/technical review, while proof-blocked PRs should remain open.

actions.reason: Maintainer technical review/merge decision is required; this worker cannot merge or repair.
Broad CLI/session-state change needs maintainer review; merge and fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter.
Maintainer should reconcile the proof/re-review state before any merge path; this job cannot update labels, fix, or merge safely.
Keep open as a related proof-blocked PR; missing proof blocks merge but does not justify closure or cluster escalation.
Provider API/context change needs maintainer review; replacement or repair is not allowed in this inventory job.
Large doctor/auth/session migration contract needs maintainer technical judgment; merge/fix are blocked.
Active author follow-up plus stale proof label/review state needs maintainer or review-bot reconciliation; no merge or label mutation is allowed here.
Focused test coverage PR is ready for maintainer review, but this worker cannot merge.
Proof/check state and Feishu message-delivery behavior need maintainer review before any merge path.
Keep open as a related author/proof-blocked PR; proof failure blocks merge but not non-mutating classification.
